    327.ShadowheartIllusion: You're alive! I woke up by the wreckage, surrounded by corpses. I was starting to think I was the only survivor.note: Shadowheart stands, quickly putting the box away.CRA_ShadowheartRecruitment_State_WasLeftUnconscious!DEN_ShadowHeart_HasMetDEN_ShadowHeart_HasMet

        118.Player: Things turned heated between us, back on the nautiloid. You don't have hard feelings?ORI_Shadowheart_State_WasHostileInTutorial

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • ORI_Shadowheart_State_WasHostileInTutorial {1fe1e3ef-3ad0-4e7c-b94e-4cfe5d4cb07c} = True

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4327a1d7-b50e-cf5e-8270-5e2a7d407749Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbffbb3a5ga48dg41a9ga687gf52c368193deText UUID: 0e319cd1-c548-42cc-98a2-2ce9fc515316Show Once: True
        • +
          333.ShadowheartIllusion: I haven't forgotten what happened between us, but I also haven't forgotten I'd still be trapped in that pod if it wasn't for you. Let's call it even - we both have bigger concerns.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cd74a670-758e-dbe9-c284-dc832b18d7bfSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h4f8640c8g6b51g45e2g98a2gad95c768cf31Text UUID: f5fe4a76-fe41-433b-bd79-fe573d9122ffTimeline Phase Index: 21Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cd74a670-758e-dbe9-c284-dc832b18d7bfTimeline Phase Duration: 14.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 152.06s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 152.89s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 155.99s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 156.87s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 158.87s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 162.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [152.06s-166.57s] | @ 164.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
          • +
            62.ShadowheartIllusion: We might be clear of those monsters' ship, but we still have their spawn inside our heads. We need to get rid of them while we still can.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 27f79905-0701-8692-db5b-434955b1809bSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h42f44702g540eg45e1g89adg0bb2b6867a84Text UUID: 384df1a0-8dd3-4f35-ad76-cab6307bde2fTimeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 27f79905-0701-8692-db5b-434955b1809bTimeline Phase Duration: 9.05sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 547.87s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 548.9s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 550.69s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 551.47s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 553.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [547.87s-555.8s] | @ 555.24s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [555.8s-556.92s] | @ 555.8s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [555.8s-556.92s] | @ 556.16s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [555.8s-556.92s] | @ 556.36s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [555.8s-556.92s] | @ 556.58s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicry

          68.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course. I'd be stuck in a pod - or worse - if it wasn't for you. Glad to see you're all right. Now maybe we can help one another.

          Metadata

        149.Player: I'm surprised you made it this far by yourself.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5122737c-fc02-e24c-7879-9b9c9da67d75Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4b10d865g7d4eg4126g8e69g18ed30844d28Text UUID: 01dbbe2a-3ca1-4718-9d0e-c2643391267bShow Once: True
        • +
          280.ShadowheartIllusion: I'm not helpless. Once I came to, I set out to find some means of surviving: supplies, shelter... and a healer, of course.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a567e009-c2a0-d8c8-ee20-dd14feead9d7Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h7cde478dg723dg4b55gb358gdee8baa9b214Text UUID: 71e213af-4e0e-4723-a1fa-b464b8e16f90Timeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a567e009-c2a0-d8c8-ee20-dd14feead9d7Timeline Phase Duration: 8.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 203.96s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 204.49s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 206.1s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 208.34s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 209.38s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 210.16s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [203.96s-212.74s] | @ 211.54s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)

        410.Player: Seems you've got a head-start on me. What are you doing here?

        Metadata

          194.ShadowheartIllusion: This was the first sign of friendly life I came across. I hoped I might find supplies, shelter... and a healer, of course.

          Metadata

                                                                            285.ShadowheartIllusion: I saw it, in your head. You follow someone else's orders. I'll deal with them, not you.

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9186e65-44b6-1cbd-d26e-d198b6fed506Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h9e760cd2g985eg4e47ga410g657d9aa636aaText UUID: 734a2e7b-71b1-2418-d923-b0864dbed492Group ID: 9ea31822-91e5-383f-0cfe-d23dc0a8f3afGroup Index: 1
                                                                            • +
                                                                              182.Player: Wait - after all that, you won't join me?

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 65b79f14-722c-acfa-3155-d60bc6fac663Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd8ebc845g462ag4bd5g9462gcb517d401896Text UUID: 3eb21d46-908d-f1c5-cfd8-d617e878b389Show Once: True
                                                                              • •
                                                                                266.ShadowheartIllusion: Oh I'll join you. If you have whoever's in charge alongside you. Otherwise, I'd best be on my way.

                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9ccb3691-47f5-9353-d2e4-970588d26f97Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h42d0c608gc0b4g4883ga7a6g2481830388f9Text UUID: 75ccc9db-c4b2-d7b2-ed18-1855e0224d70Timeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9ccb3691-47f5-9353-d2e4-970588d26f97Timeline Phase Duration: 8.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [112.29s-119.58s] | @ 112.54s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [112.29s-119.58s] | @ 114.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [112.29s-119.58s] | @ 115.43s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [112.29s-119.58s] | @ 117.64s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
                                                                            • +

                                                                              • •

                                                                              147.ShadowheartIllusion: I'd join you... but things are looking a tad crowded. You'll need to make room for me.note: <placeholder>ShadowheartGLO_Tutorials_FullPartyRejection

                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                              • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                              settype Global
                                                                              • GLO_Tutorials_FullPartyRejection {94a40e88-0e15-33f5-0beb-0332de542341} = True

                                                                              Text

                                                                              combine=0
                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                              I'd join you... but things are looking a tad crowded. You'll need to make room for me.
                                                                              h48c81a2bg599fg48c0g808dg65c987cafc00 | b9f3f223-3015-4316-8c2f-ec5ae19b6aeb | stub
                                                                              It seems like you have ample company already. You'll need to figure out who you can live without before I can join.
                                                                              h86754fd5g4352g4b52gade7g2c02835d92bd | 7dd67bd7-879d-44b7-99f5-2042ec9a1c67 | stub
                                                                              Your dance card is full. Lose a partner, and there'll be room for me.
                                                                              h12cdf18ag22a6g4227ga5fegb5c043a33915 | 9885b508-a224-4319-a845-797369769b0f | stub
                                                                              A bit crowded, don't you think? You'll need to swap out someone if you want me.
                                                                              h0930f7a1gcaa7g4c08ga7a3g27505eb840fe | 8306fca0-6cbd-4a09-aa07-654425abf08d | stub

                                                                                    204.Astarion: If I must. But do try to keep them safe - they're a little useless without me.

                                                                                    Text

                                                                                    If I must. But do try to keep them safe - they're a little useless without me.
                                                                                    hef5b074dg7231g4214g93fegf66062cb9235 | 33fb7c2c-0724-40ee-aea6-208bf834940a | stub
                                                                                    Oh, gladly. This circus is all yours, my friend.
                                                                                    hdb14d045gbb06g4277g9381g90bc26f57dff | 545b2def-40b9-4a37-a572-26d4c364c5b7 | stub
                                                                                    I would object, but sitting by the fire while you do all the hard work sounds marvellous, actually.
                                                                                    h71fc4944gc73bg4441g8659g54f803e49ac8 | 97f58fd6-0666-472d-adf1-04c4169d79b5 | stub

                                                                                        297.ShadowheartIllusion: Well chosen. [End]Lae'zelShadowheartWyllJaheiraHalsinOriginAddToParty

                                                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                                                        ruletagtype rule
                                                                                        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                                        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                        • Jaheira {8457eb5f-036c-4143-b6cf-447a9f555c7a}
                                                                                        • Halsin {9b8709f9-8d2a-4b4e-a465-8505c561d7f5}
                                                                                        settype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
                                                                                        • OriginAddToParty {4870b2cd-210c-0fdc-9c58-4d0142bdae29} = True

                                                                                        Text

                                                                                        Variant 1

                                                                                        combine=0
                                                                                        • Lae'zel
                                                                                        Well chosen.
                                                                                        hb44d234ag9cbcg45d1ga879gd5ad20f1c3aa | fe35c1e4-56a7-4772-95d6-c0b297cf6227 | stub
                                                                                        Good. Our victory is most certain.
                                                                                        h56e55774gb370g4bbcg85aagef5d26c71d46 | a9adbe26-38e5-45cf-9963-8dbdec7fdf2c | stub
                                                                                        Ready for battle.
                                                                                        he7b4df6fg130fg4e96gbcb2gdb2129ed01f7 | fd485358-9eb9-4323-b21b-8d99ca34be18 | stub

                                                                                        Variant 2

                                                                                        combine=0
                                                                                        • Shadowheart
                                                                                        Lead the way, then.
                                                                                        h2cf685f6gf1e3g4989gbecbg4a9213a47f4f | 6fd2a6d3-d3d7-4d96-9b0b-b605f4940806 | stub
                                                                                        Wonderful. I was beginning to feel a little left out.
                                                                                        h620f0723g14dcg4858g80fdg063399ef8b9c | f5353ce0-ff6e-4259-ab42-0b4e32a19865 | stub

                                                                                        Variant 3

                                                                                        combine=0
                                                                                        • Wyll
                                                                                        Ready and willing!
                                                                                        h9e763549g8ac7g48f9gb778g28c9ef612ee6 | c5f48bc6-f3a9-4058-9255-9b7761e0b04d | stub
                                                                                        Let's make this happen.
                                                                                        h7cab6fdcg5e63g492cg8ab9g855c85cd74a1 | 00c1d8d2-4a1a-43d0-9b6d-fe237e168484 | stub
                                                                                        I like how you think.
                                                                                        h2cfd7989g412fg4a98ga57dg18569e172fac | 74fe0201-ed5f-4120-8079-57669f0a5118 | stub

                                                                                        Variant 4

                                                                                        combine=0
                                                                                        • Jaheira
                                                                                        At your command.
                                                                                        hb07c1d85g41fcg42fbga569g178a323dc9f3 | 4d3810e3-2e32-4c77-bfce-f50728bafbc2 | stub
                                                                                        Then let us be about it.
                                                                                        hc764c868g20a0g4c52g87cbg37830215d517 | 83724e6c-b8e7-4016-91b7-44d335c18592 | stub

                                                                                        Variant 5

                                                                                        combine=0
                                                                                        • Halsin
                                                                                        Ready at your side.
                                                                                        h216d86d3g111bg485eg9636ga7d6f3f19d35 | cd9550d5-952a-44d9-8e9c-b2cd499579c5 | stub
                                                                                        I'm with you.
                                                                                        h2dace211g5cf6g4b20g81c0g242a63308136 | 90601404-47fd-4f23-8f26-630616e405d5 | stub

                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    106.Gale: I'll get little rest given the stack of unread books waiting for me - but I'll try.

                                                                                    Text

                                                                                    I'll get little rest given the stack of unread books waiting for me - but I'll try.
                                                                                    hf8be3365g62e3g4e5bga8feg7777bfb679c1 | a2cedf88-224b-4295-b6bf-48254f428e43 | stub
                                                                                    The mind is strong, but the knees... well, they are a little sore. I'll gladly put my feet up.
                                                                                    h9e51b4eagf0c5g4610g9af4g28dbf554d4a4 | a9fc5647-53dd-4dfe-8dfa-452c79642c22 | stub
                                                                                    Keeping your greatest weapon in reserve, eh? An excellent strategy.

                                                                                    31.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Aw! Why me?! Guess I'll just sit on my thumb in camp then.

                                                                                246.Player: I'll be back.

                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8f48a63c-24aa-0ad8-7aa4-d86d493f6927Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h125d9a13g824eg4154g98e9gb44b236d1237Text UUID: 85e3bb7e-ece9-4557-a157-48e0a0a021e1Show Once: True
                                                                                • •
                                                                                  359.ShadowheartIllusion: Buh-bye. [End]KarlachAstarionLae'zelGaleShadowheart+5 more

                                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                                  ruletagtype rule
                                                                                  • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                  • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                  • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                  • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                  • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                                  • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                  • Jaheira {8457eb5f-036c-4143-b6cf-447a9f555c7a}
                                                                                  • Halsin {9b8709f9-8d2a-4b4e-a465-8505c561d7f5}
                                                                                  • Minthara {3e84e1cd-2193-4f9f-80b4-c2ededefaea6}
                                                                                  • Minsc {aeb694fc-83fb-452d-819a-b97ba442dc42}

                                                                                  Text

                                                                                  Variant 1

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Karlach
                                                                                  Buh-bye.
                                                                                  ha8b13208g861dg43d6g9dedg9ed21b17cb62 | bcb23cd3-8685-4746-a16a-25e63f518027 | stub
                                                                                  See you around.
                                                                                  h8156fd44g4240g4520gaed4g89aa48d3d653 | 617a0e3a-c6a1-4a66-b915-ebe2b69386d2 | stub
                                                                                  Till next time.
                                                                                  h036b8806gefadg44a2g9f36g47913e3cd771 | 3c7b545f-c356-4da8-8817-cce0f4df18b3 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 2

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Astarion
                                                                                  Until then, darling.
                                                                                  h2568d8adgc0dcg4e3agabc1gfa346660131a | b08ff996-1822-4bce-87ee-e6b186063c85 | stub
                                                                                  If you say so.
                                                                                  h802868ffg517fg44cbga256gd946fbe6fda1 | b1655d54-65bb-44ff-8fe5-b9450dee5e40 | stub
                                                                                  All right, but don't keep me waiting, darling.
                                                                                  hf0dae8dfgc25ag4154g8f87g141ad95ce352 | dba6914c-2856-40e0-8dfe-f6adee9b8d78 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 3

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Lae'zel
                                                                                  I will see you soon.
                                                                                  h2ae257a0g1c0cg411eg9fb5gacf2c439d715 | 589e76ce-66a0-430d-9cd6-b65386195d8c | stub
                                                                                  Find me later. You know where to look.
                                                                                  hfa4a0910g4aa9g44b5gae5ag2f89f1b81cde | f92a17a6-f0f9-407b-abde-84792dfa077b | stub
                                                                                  Farewell, for now.
                                                                                  h7f73cb52g8e88g46fegb3cfg9dbcbbf399f0 | 114fb61a-4787-48e0-96d1-995ee003d8c6 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 4

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Gale
                                                                                  I should certainly hope so.
                                                                                  ha3398ab5g0b8fg4b6eg8e07g866651326180 | a3a05281-268a-423e-8e22-e8fb91255a55 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 5

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Shadowheart
                                                                                  Later, then.
                                                                                  h30067c49g79f1g4c73g8826gabb15ee462cb | bfa2bf70-d3d6-4745-8ff0-deea6eadc48a | stub
                                                                                  Whenever you're ready.
                                                                                  h3a1d9dcfg08b4g4f0eg9816gb147262cf14d | 8c87b99f-d522-4714-a0d9-553960cc355a | stub

                                                                                  Variant 6

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Wyll
                                                                                  Take care. We'll catch up later.
                                                                                  h5a24c3c3gf60bg4651g97ecg944b609018b2 | 37e4d838-bada-4eab-bf5c-da844c92631d | stub
                                                                                  Good-bye.
                                                                                  haa12fd48g7004g4710g8e09ge34dc01f1a56 | 513f9cdc-6a9b-4eb0-8ba1-648edaeeba0b | stub
                                                                                  Keep safe.
                                                                                  h34682b82g859eg4754g85f3g13b82e1a938b | c0c44ec2-f8f5-4193-ac3d-1457e39fcc98 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 7

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Jaheira
                                                                                  I'll be waiting.
                                                                                  h2d12bfb6g8433g470bga425g53a6d15bebd6 | 227da813-c54c-4172-9362-a156fbadc9c5 | stub
                                                                                  Do not rush on my account.
                                                                                  ha0fde5a4gde6eg4188g94efg214ddfca5e1a | ab85a94b-e0fc-499a-8191-08295afc0c31 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 8

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Halsin
                                                                                  Take your time.
                                                                                  he80c7f91g3ca2g4671g9547gc770edd580e4 | 2cdbd260-3786-4520-bc7d-09368cde6b61 | stub
                                                                                  I look forward to it.
                                                                                  he287496bg0be7g4812g94dega1a3e7faf0e9 | e3cdbe21-fde0-4f01-b5be-7c3812960907 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 9

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Minthara
                                                                                  Farewell.
                                                                                  hc69e30f2g54ffg4a93gaab7gba73e30c2268 | 0cf4f073-da6a-486e-bcfd-90b8a7ad94e8 | stub
                                                                                  Good travels. I'll be waiting.
                                                                                  h3a9db7eeg69f6g41dfgb843g08dddb2ea043 | 665d303a-aab3-4984-ac2f-4b3c9becb178 | stub

                                                                                  Variant 10

                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                  • Minsc
                                                                                  And Minsc shall still be Minsc! I hope?
                                                                                  h3597ad74g7bc8g438fg8c5dge661ab3bdd4f | e722d08d-2831-409b-a9ec-fd0e2bb74bc7 | stub
                                                                                  Take your time, my friend! Boo shall snooze a while longer.
                                                                                  h784f1d37g4cc2g4290g8cc0geaf7c34751cb | 91df33b6-f8fd-4cc2-9f04-eed860bf151a | stub

                                                                              320.ShadowheartIllusion: It would've been all too easy for you to run right past my pod, but you didn't. I'll remember that.

                        337.ShadowheartIllusion: ...Agh! You've got one of those things in your head too. Can't run away from that.

                        Metadata

                    261.Narrator: *Suddenly you see what she sees. Feel what she feels. Distrust. Hostility. Because you are gith.*note: The mind meld narration will only play if the player hasn't met Astarion, Wyll and Lae'zel (ie they haven't experienced many of these companion mindmelds yet)MINDMELD!ORI_Wyll_HasMet!ORI_Astarion_HasMet!ORI_Laezel_HasMetGithyankiShadowheart_Recruitment_Den_Event_MindmeldNarrationPlayed

                          241.ShadowheartIllusion: Of course, but what you really need - what both of us need - is a healer.

                          Metadata
